scene.name: Mountain Road — Blizzard
scene.description: A narrow mountain road through dense forest. A blizzard has descended with terrifying speed — visibility is barely thirty feet. The sun bleeds its last light through the snow, turning the world a bruised purple. Each of you has been traveling alone through these mountains, and each has heard the stories: travelers who vanish on these roads, animals found drained of blood, lights that move through the trees at night. The cold is killing. You need shelter. Ahead, through the hammering snow, you catch a faint orange glow.
scene.arrivalNotes: Each PC arrives alone at random intervals over the last hour before sunset. They do not know each other. Each has their own reason for being on this road. Run each arrival individually — a brief solo scene on the road (Perception checks, strange sounds, shadows between trees) before they reach the inn door.

scenes.name: Mountain Road — Blizzard
scenes.description: The approach. Each PC travels alone through the blizzard. Strange sounds, shadows, a dead deer drained of blood. The road leads to a faint warm glow.

scenes.name: The Pallid Hart — Common Room
scenes.description: A cramped common room lit by a dying fire. Snow hammers the shuttered windows. The wind screams. A bar runs along the back wall where a nervous woman polishes the same glass over and over. A hooded figure sits motionless in the far corner. The door to the cellar is closed, a cloth draped over its handle.

marta.name: Marta Kowalski
knowledge: Her husband Piotr disappeared three weeks ago
Two other travelers vanished from the inn recently
Scratching sounds from the cellar at night
A dead animal drained of blood found behind the inn
The hooded stranger arrived two days ago and barely speaks

tomas.name: Tomas Birkov
tomas.role: Nervous trapper sitting near the door
knowledge: He is a werewolf, cursed two years ago
The full moon rises tonight — he cannot control the transformation
He came to the inn hoping to lock himself in the cellar before moonrise
He can smell something unnatural in the inn but doesn't know it's a vampire
He knows these mountain woods intimately — every trail, cave, and den
The scratches on his arms are self-inflicted from his last transformation
revealTriggers: The full moon becomes visible through a broken shutter or opened door
He is badly wounded and the beast takes over
Someone examines his wounds closely (DC 14 Medicine/Nature)
Midnight approaches and he becomes desperate to reach the cellar

hooded-stranger.name: The Stranger
knowledge: He is the vampire responsible for the disappearances
He has a coffin hidden in the cellar
He senses which players are most vulnerable
Dawn will force him to retreat
revealTriggers: Someone enters the cellar and finds his coffin
Holy symbol brandished with genuine faith
Dawn approaches and he becomes desperate

beats.name: Each PC arrives alone on the mountain road — solo scenes with Perception checks, strange sounds, shadows in the trees, a dead bloodless deer
PCs reach the Pallid Hart one by one, shaking snow from their cloaks. Marta greets them nervously. The warmth is a relief but the inn feels wrong.

Characters introduce themselves to each other and to the patrons — Henryk the merchant, Brother Aldric the pilgrim, Katya the minstrel, Old Gregor the farmer. And the hooded stranger who says nothing.
Players notice something off — the stranger, Marta's nervousness, odd details
First concrete evidence something is wrong (missing husband, bloodless animal, cellar sounds)
Players actively search for answers — questioning NPCs, exploring the inn
Something frightening happens — lights go out, someone screams, blood is found
Players discover definitive evidence of the vampire (coffin, feeding, supernatural event)
The vampire is confronted or reveals himself
Final battle or desperate survival until dawn
Dawn breaks. Survivors emerge. The party is forged in shared trauma.
